product.name: miliboo Heavy Duty Tripod Professional Video Tripod for Camera Fluid Head Tripods Stand with Ground Spreader, Capacity 33 lbs, Height 18.5-65.8 inches, Aluminum (MTT609A)
features: **Professional-Grade Stability** - Constructed with aerospace-grade aluminum (legs 16-22 mm, 1.2 mm thick) to support up to 33 lbs. Ideal for heavy DSLRs, professional camcorders, and studio equipment. Dual-row leg design delivers rock-solid stability, outperforming standard tripods by 40%.

**Buttery-Smooth Floud Head** - Precision-engineered MYT803 hydraulic head with adjustable damping delivers silky-smooth pan and tilt movements. 360° full-circle rotation with tilt range from -75° to +90°. Triple-layer steel bearings and freeze-resistant shock-absorbing fluid ensure stable performance in any weather.

**Ultimate Height Flexibility** - Adjustable from 18.5 inches to 65.8 inches, featuring an innovative ground extension system offering 6 distinct height positions. Ideal for low-angle shots, overhead shots, and everything in between. Folds down to a compact 35.9 inches for easy transport in the included carrying case.

**Universal Compatibility & Quick Setup** - Fits all cameras via 1/4“ and 3/8” threads. One-touch quick-release system for instant camera mounting/dismounting. Compatible with DSLRs, camcorders, telescopes, binoculars, and projectors. Built-in bubble level ensures perfect shots every time.

**Complete Professional Kit** - Includes all items: MTT609A tripod body, MYT803 hydraulic head, quick-release plate, handle, ground extension, carrying case, screws, and tools. Features a 2-year warranty and 24/7 professional support. Ready to use right out of the box.
